Debugging, issue triage, documentation, iterative delivery; stakeholder collaboration
Process discipline from high-compliance and high-volume environments
7+ years across editorial publishing, entertainment/media campaigns, and AI-driven production workflows

Performance marketing across Meta Ads and Google Ads; Meta Pixel retargeting and lookalike audiences
Managed $40K–$100K annual marketing budgets; disciplined reporting (sales, traffic, engagement, subscriber metrics)
Web execution: WordPress + Shopify site management; YouTube publishing and growth
Hands-on cleanroom experience supporting lithography, photoresist coating, wet etch, dry etch, chamber cleans, and CD metrology
Strong tool discipline, SOP adherence, documentation habits, and EHS/chemical safety mindset
Escalates exceptions/yield concerns; collaborates with engineers/tool owners on troubleshooting and continuous improvement

proclamation.subject: DKTR N9NE Day
proclamation.person_named: Maurice Thomas (also known as the Rhythm & Blues recording artist DKTR N9NE)

issuing_authority.name: Steve Adler
issuing_authority.role: Mayor of the City of Austin, Texas

key_statements_paraphrased: Recognizes meaningful music contributions to thousands of Austinites and others in the Austin community
Notes appearances at culturally historic venues such as The Victory Grill
Notes writing songs for multi-platinum producers and work featuring artists from emerging local to internationally renowned
States accolades and accomplishments exemplify cultural excellence associated with the City of Austin
proclamation.formal_closing_paraphrased: In witness whereof, the Mayor set his hand and caused the seal of the City of Austin to be affixed on February 6, 2018.
